summary: Phase 2/3 backend + frontend testing complete. 60 total backend tests (41/42 legacy + 19/19 new Phase23) passing. Frontend admin pages for Stations, Widgets, Seasons, Audit, Settings and user /privacy-account all load without console errors, render correct German UI with data-testid attributes, and are integrated with the backend (verified audit log picks up branding.update written via settings PUT).

minor.issue: test_admin_add_lap_time_resorts intermittently fails because prior test runs leave multiple users with identical 30000ms fastest times; the newly inserted record may not tie-break to the target user. Pre-existing behavior, not Phase 2/3 regression. Consider tie-break by created_at DESC so newest fastest wins.

Slug support still missing on /api/tournaments/{id}/(generate-bracket|register|checkin|bracket|standings|registrations) and /api/f1/challenges/{id}/(leaderboard|championship|times|export.csv) - reported in iteration_1. PDF/Widget endpoints correctly accept slug_or_id.

action_items: (Optional) Tie-break admin-added lap times by created_at so new fastest time always wins when equal, to stabilize regression test.
critical_code_review_comments: extras_routes.py: widget endpoints correctly strip sensitive fields (notes/discord/platform_id/admin_note/reports/proof_url/email/password_hash) - good.
PDF endpoints consistently support slug_or_id - good; recommend tournament/F1 action endpoints adopt the same pattern for API consistency.
DSGVO /export-my-data returns all 5 required collections (user, tournament_registrations, f1_lap_times, teams, email_logs) plus exported_at timestamp - spec compliant.
Audit log is written on settings.branding.update and settings.email.update - verified by GET /api/audit after PUT.
F1 PATCH /api/f1/times/{id} accepts proof_url/is_invalid/admin_note and persists correctly - verified via GET /api/f1/challenges/{cid}/times roundtrip.
Swiss/next-round and groups/generate correctly reject non-matching tournament formats (single_elim) with 4xx.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested admin + DSGVO pages (no console errors)

test_credentials: admin@thelionsquad.at / TLSAdmin2026! and leon_king@demo.thelionsquad.at / demo123 verified.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ users via /api/auth/register, TEST-Station via POST /api/stations (deleted), TEST Season (deleted), and temporarily flag one F1 lap time as invalid (reverted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2/3 test file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_3.py covers: Settings (public/email/branding+audit), Seasons CRUD, Widgets (bracket+F1 without sensitive fields), DSGVO export, Audit admin-only, PDF exports (participants/checkin/matches/standings + f1 leaderboard with %PDF header verification), Stations CRUD, F1 time PATCH with proof_url/is_invalid, Swiss/Groups rejection on wrong format. All 19 green. Frontend verified admin pages /admin/{stations,widgets,seasons,audit,settings} and /privacy-account: each renders proper German headings, forms with data-testid attributes (widget-type, season-submit, email-api-key, dsgvo-export-btn, dsgvo-anonymize-btn, station-assign-*, etc). Station page shows 9 seeded stations with free/busy/broken/reserved selector and Match zuweisen button. Anonymize button intentionally NOT triggered per instructions.
rca of the issue: test_admin_add_lap_time_resorts flake: inserting new lap time with time_ms=30000 produces duplicate when rerun; leaderboard sorts by effective_ms only, and there is no tie-break by created_at. First matching user wins, which may be a stale test user. Fix: add .sort([('time_ms', 1), ('created_at', -1)]) when picking best_per_user in f1_routes.leaderboard, or use time_ms < (not <=) so new insert cannot overwrite existing best for same user — but more robustly, de-duplicate by taking latest of equal times.
